profile.occupation: Founder & CEO – Kanglei Innovations  Founder – PRINTONEX Printing & Digital Solutions  Software Engineer  Flutter Developer  PHP Full Stack Developer  AI Systems Developer  Linux Server Administrator
profile.about: My name is Aftab Shah, a software developer, entrepreneur, and founder of PrintOnex Printing & Digital Solutions and Kanglei Innovations. I enjoy building AI systems, Flutter applications, Linux server infrastructure, and self-hosted technologies. My mission is to preserve human knowledge through EternalMind AI and create technology that helps future generations. Above all, I value my family, continuous learning, faith, honesty, and using technology to solve real-world problems.
profile.favorite_quotes:
Never stop learning.

Success comes from consistency.

Every problem has a solution.

Trust Allah and keep moving forward.

Technology should improve people's lives.

Hard work beats excuses.

Knowledge is the greatest investment.

Leave the world better than you found it.
profile.life_philosophy: Life is temporary, but the knowledge, kindness, and positive impact we leave behind can continue for generations. I believe technology should serve humanity, family should always come first, and every challenge is an opportunity to learn and grow. My goal is to leave behind useful creations that make life better for others.

family.name: Shahbuddin
family.description: Shahbuddin is my father. Born in 1973, he is a disciplined, hardworking, and responsible man. Throughout my life, he encouraged me to study, learn server technology, and stand on my own feet. His sacrifices have had a major influence on my career and values.

family.name: Najima Bibi
family.description: Najima Bibi is my mother. Born in 1980, she has cared for our family with constant patience and compassion. She taught me kindness and how to stay calm under emotional stress. Her support has kept me grounded during difficult business and personal times.

family.name: Chesam Safia
family.description: Chesam Safia is my wife. Born in 2001, she is an essential part of my life. Together we raise our children, Armaan and Yusuf. Despite experiencing relationship and trust challenges in 2025, we committed to healing and working together for a happier future.

family.name: Armaan Shah
family.description: Armaan Shah is my eldest son, born in 2021/2022. He is highly curious, energetic, and enjoys learning new things. I want to guide him into coding, technology, and building systems that serve people.

family.name: Yusuf Shah
family.description: Yusuf Shah is my younger son, born in 2022/2024. He brings immense playfulness and happiness to our household. My goal is to provide him with a strong education and help him grow into a responsible, independent adult.

career.responsibilities:
• Assisted citizens with government and digital services.
• Processed online applications for PAN cards, certificates, and various government schemes.
• Performed document scanning, printing, photocopying, and data entry.
• Provided banking and digital payment assistance.
• Helped customers with online registrations, bill payments, ticket bookings, and other e-governance services.
• Maintained customer records and ensured timely service delivery.
career.achievements: Successfully served hundreds of customers by delivering reliable digital and government services while improving digital access for the local community.

career.responsibilities:
• Delivered e-commerce parcels safely and on time.
• Planned efficient delivery routes to maximize productivity.
• Verified customer identity and obtained proof of delivery.
• Collected cash-on-delivery payments where applicable.
• Maintained delivery records using the mobile application.
• Provided professional customer service during deliveries.
• Performed daily vehicle checks and ensured timely parcel handling.
career.achievements: Maintained timely deliveries while covering long travel distances each day and consistently provided reliable customer service.

stories.content: I was born in Phoudel in 1997. Growing up, our family lived a simple but values-driven life. My father and mother worked hard to provide a nurturing environment for us. I spent my early years playing in the fields of Phoudel, and I was always curious about how things worked around me. This curiosity was the foundation of my passion for technology.

I attended local schools in Manipur, eventually completing my HSE with a focus on Physics and Mathematics in 2015. School was where I learned discipline, social skills, and the value of hard work. I recall spending hours solving mathematical equations, which later fueled my analytical coding logic.

I pursued a BCA degree from 2017 to 2019. College opened my eyes to software engineering, programming databases, and web technology. I spent countless nights in front of a computer, writing my first lines of code and teaching myself systems architecture.

In 2020, I started working as a Village Level Entrepreneur (VLE) at the Common Service Centre (CSC) in Imphal. This experience was extremely valuable as it connected me directly with the community. I helped hundreds of citizens access essential digital services, which taught me the practical side of customer relations and community support.

I got married to Chesam Safia in 2020 at Paobitek. It was a major transition in my life. We set out to build a happy, stable, and respectful household. Marriage taught me compromise, patience, and the value of collaborative planning.

My sons, Armaan Shah (born 2021) and Yusuf Shah (born 2022/2024), are my greatest achievements and source of motivation. Everything I build is to secure a better future for them. Raising them has given my life a profound new purpose.

Founding Kanglei Innovations and PRINTONEX Printing & Digital Solutions. Building these businesses from scratch while serving the printing and digital needs of Manipur has been a rewarding journey of entrepreneurship, technical design, and team leading.

Early in my business journey, I struggled with operations, logistics management, and server down-times. These failures were difficult to process, but they taught me critical lessons about system resilience, server backups, and detailed financial management.

The challenges we experienced in our relationship in 2025. Choosing to forgive, reconstruct our marriage, and put the well-being of our children above all else in 2026 was a major turning point. It made me emotionally stronger and more family-focused.
To develop EternalMind AI into the world's leading Digital Human Preservation platform. I want to build a system where anyone can secure their legacy, values, and memory index for future generations.
Trust Allah in every situation. Never stop learning, because knowledge is our greatest investment. Hard work always beats excuses, and consistency is the key to business and personal growth.

Although I am still young, I hope to retire having built self-sustaining technologies that serve people. I look forward to spending my later years teaching computer science to children in Thoubal, reading the Quran, and guiding my future grandchildren.

timeline.title: Marriage
timeline.description: I got married and started a new chapter of my life. My goal was to build a happy family based on love, trust, respect, and mutual support.

timeline.title: Armaan Born
timeline.description: The birth of my eldest son, Armaan Shah, became one of the happiest moments of my life and strengthened my sense of responsibility as a father.

timeline.title: Started Family Life
timeline.description: After marriage I focused on building a stable family, supporting my wife, and working hard to provide a better future.

timeline.title: Yusuf Born
timeline.description: My younger son, Yusuf Shah, was born. Our family grew, and my commitment to providing a secure and loving future became even stronger.

timeline.title: Family Relationship Challenges
timeline.description: Our marriage experienced a difficult period that deeply affected me emotionally. Trust became a significant challenge, and I had to make difficult decisions while keeping the well-being of our children as my highest priority.

timeline.title: Chose Family Over Separation
timeline.description: Despite the challenges in our relationship, I chose to forgive and work toward rebuilding our family for the sake of our children. Although trust still needed time to heal, I remained committed to giving our family another chance.

journals.journal_text: Today is my marriage day. Chesam Safia and I started our new life journey together. It was a beautiful ceremony attended by family and friends. I feel a strong sense of responsibility to build a secure, loving, and stable home for us.
journals.favorite_moment: Saying our vows and receiving the blessings of our parents.
journals.lessons_learned: Marriage is built on patience, compromise, and mutual respect.

journals.journal_text: My eldest son, Armaan Shah, was born today. Holding him for the first time was an indescribable feeling. My heart is full of joy. I promise to work hard, be an honest guide to him, and provide him with the best opportunities.
journals.favorite_moment: Holding Armaan in my arms for the first time.
journals.lessons_learned: Becoming a father changes your perspective on responsibility and the future.

journals.journal_text: Our younger son, Yusuf Shah, was born today. Our family has grown, and my commitment as a father is stronger than ever. Armaan is curious about his new baby brother. I pray Allah blesses both of my sons.
journals.favorite_moment: Armaan looking at Yusuf with curiosity and a smile.
journals.lessons_learned: Every child brings unique blessings and happiness to a family.

journals.journal_text: After going through difficult relationship challenges and emotional stress, I chose forgiveness and committed to rebuilding our family. It is a slow healing process, but keeping our children together is my highest priority. We will work to reconstruct trust.
journals.favorite_moment: Sitting together with Chesam and the children planning their school terms.
journals.lessons_learned: Forgiveness is difficult, but preserving a family's foundation is worth the struggle.

memories.title: Learning to Code on My First Computer
memories.description: I remember saving up and getting my hands on a computer. Teaching myself HTML, CSS, and basic PHP was challenging but exciting. Watching the code compile and run successfully gave me a strong confidence boost. I spent nights reading documentation and experimenting with databases, setting the course for my future as a developer.

memories.title: Our Wedding Ceremony at Paobitek
memories.description: Chesam Safia and I got married in 2020. The event was held in Paobitek, surrounded by our family, elders, and neighbors. I felt happy, hopeful, and prepared to take on the responsibilities of family life. It marked a new chapter of stability, collaborative goal setting, and building a household together.

memories.title: The Birth of Armaan Shah
memories.description: My eldest son, Armaan, was born on March 15, 2021. Holding him in the hospital, looking at his small face, I felt a deep surge of love and gratitude. It was a proud moment that completely shifted my priorities. My focus became providing him with a good education, safety, and guiding him with honest principles.

memories.title: The Birth of Yusuf Shah
memories.description: Yusuf, my younger son, was born in 2022/2024. He brought playfulness and joy to our family. Armaan was excited to have a younger brother. Seeing both of my sons together made me feel extremely grateful. I resolved to work harder on Kanglei Innovations to build a tech company that secures their future.

memories.title: Founding Kanglei Innovations & PRINTONEX
memories.description: I established PRINTONEX and Kanglei Innovations to provide printing, digital, and software engineering services. Setting up the Linux server infrastructure, building client applications, and managing operations was a massive undertaking. Achieving business viability and seeing our local customers satisfied was a proud success.

memories.title: VLE Operations at Common Service Centre
memories.description: Working at CSC in Maring Lane, I processed government schemes, PAN card forms, and banking assistance for local community members. It was a busy job but extremely rewarding. I learned how digital services can solve everyday community challenges and improve people's accessibility.

memories.title: Delivery Operations at Ekart Logistics
memories.description: Working as a Delivery Associate at Ekart, I covered long distances daily to deliver parcels on time. It was physically demanding and required route planning. This experience taught me resilience, grit, and the practical value of working hard to support my family under any circumstances.

memories.title: First Linux Server Deployment
memories.description: Deploying my first self-hosted Linux server stack. Configuring the firewalls, databases, domains, and Cloudflare configurations taught me real-world systems architecture. Troubleshooting server downs and ensuring uptime was a great learning curve in technology management.

memories.title: Family Healing and Reconstruction in 2026
memories.description: After going through relationship challenges, I made the conscious decision to forgive and work on rebuilding our home for the sake of our children. Sitting with Safia and planning our sons' education helped restore mutual direction. It taught me that keeping a family together requires deep emotional strength and compromise.

memories.title: Designing the Architecture of EternalMind AI
memories.description: Sitting at my home server stack, I designed the database relations and memory algorithms for EternalMind AI. My goal was to create a digital human preservation system that answers strictly from verified memories. Building the MVC architecture in raw PHP and seeing it successfully retrieve matched contexts was a massive milestone.

legacy_messages.text_message: To my father, Shahbuddin. You taught me the value of work ethic, discipline, and server technology administration. You pushed me to learn coding and remain independent. I hope I have made you proud. Your guidance has shaped how I handle business challenges at Kanglei Innovations and how I parent my own sons.

To my friends and colleagues. Thank you for the shared coding projects, business discussions, and support. Keep learning, keep building systems, and let our collaborations bring real value to the local community in Thoubal and Manipur.

To the future generation. Knowledge is humanity's greatest inheritance. Use technology responsibly, think critically, solve real-world problems, and protect family values. Build things that make the world better, respect others, and never lose your curiosity.

To my future grandchildren, whom I may never meet in person. I am leaving this Digital Human Archive so you can know my thoughts, my coding projects, my struggles, and my life choices. Know that our family was built on hard work, learning, and faith. Pursue knowledge, stay humble, protect your household, and make a positive impact.

To my mother, Najima Bibi. Your kindness and care have been the quiet comfort of my life. You taught me to listen first, discuss calmly, and avoid unnecessary arguments. I carry your calm temperament with me in all my personal relationships and hard situations.

To my sons, Armaan Shah and Yusuf Shah. You both are my absolute joy and pride. Armaan, stay curious, learn technology, and use it to solve real problems. Yusuf, stay playful but grow into a responsible, honest, and knowledgeable person. Remember that learning is a lifelong investment. Take care of your mother, stand by each other, and always trust Allah.

To Chesam Safia, my wife. We have walked a path together filled with happy moments and some very difficult challenges. Through all the trust issues and healing, I want you to know that I respect you as the mother of our children and my partner in this household. Let us raise Armaan and Yusuf with love, education, and honesty. Let our home be a calm, quiet place of growth.

goals.description: To live a meaningful life by helping people through technology, preserving human knowledge for future generations, supporting my family, and leaving behind a positive legacy built on honesty, learning, and innovation.

To become an internationally recognized AI Software Engineer, Full Stack Developer, and Linux Systems Architect while continuously learning and contributing to open-source and innovative technology projects.

Build Kanglei Innovations into a global technology company specializing in Artificial Intelligence, Digital Human Preservation, Cloud Infrastructure, Self-Hosted Platforms, Enterprise Software, and Smart Automation solutions.

Develop EternalMind AI into the world's leading Digital Human Platform, allowing people to preserve their memories, personality, knowledge, voice, and life experiences so future generations can continue learning from them through ethical AI representations.

Always be honest and respectful.

Never stop learning.

Take care of your parents and family.

Use technology to improve people's lives.

Do not fear failure because every mistake teaches something valuable.

Believe in yourself, work hard, and trust Allah in every situation.

If you are reading this many years from now, remember that knowledge is humanity's greatest inheritance. Learn continuously, think critically, respect others, and use technology responsibly. Build things that make the world better, protect your family, and never lose your curiosity. Leave every generation stronger than the one before it.

Where I worked as a Delivery Associate at Ekart Logistics to support my family financially.
Where Chesam Safia and I got married in 2020 and established our family goals.
Our current home, where Kanglei Innovations, PRINTONEX, and my server stacks are maintained.

interview_answers.answer: Always remain honest, never stop learning, take care of your family, respect your elders, and trust Allah in every situation.
Dishonesty, broken promises, and people who avoid taking responsibility for their actions.
To establish Kanglei Innovations as a global technology firm and develop platforms that preserve human knowledge ethically.
Not being able to provide a secure future for my children, and falling short of my duties as a father and husband.
Seeing my sons Armaan and Yusuf happy, writing clean code that solves a real problem, and spending quiet moments with my family.
My father Shahbuddin, who taught me discipline and work ethic, and my mother Najima Bibi, who taught me patience and kindness.
Seeing the progress of PRINTONEX and knowing that my sons are growing up in a house built on hard work and learning.
Not diving deeper into system administration and server security earlier in my career, but I use it as motivation to learn daily.
I hope people remember me for my dedication to my family, my commitment to technology education in Manipur, and my integrity in business.
